periods.name: Prehistorical
periods.descriptor: Mages were anomalies in society and no formalized communities or knowledge transfer existed

periods.name: Dawn of Civilization
periods.descriptor: The first magical communities develop especially in Mesopotamia

periods.name: Herpo & the Sea Peoples
periods.descriptor: Bronze age collapse led by Herpo and his Sea Peoples

period_groups.name: Great Global Migration
period_groups.descriptor: After the Bronze Age Collapse, wizarding communities and knowledge begins to spread

periods.name: Western Seedings
periods.descriptor: Wizarding communities migrate into Western Europe, West Africa, and Arabia.

periods.name: The Great Outrush
periods.descriptor: Wizards migrate into the Baltic, Danube, Greece, Rome, India, Southeast Asia, and southern Africa

periods.name: First Eastward Push
periods.descriptor: Wizards migrate into Central Asia, the Tarim Basin, the Himalayas, and the western Pacific islands

periods.name: Second Eastward Push
periods.descriptor: Wizards migrate into Korea and Japan along the Liaodong corridor and Yayoi routes.

periods.name: Final Great Migration
periods.descriptor: All regions of the world have a wizarding presence

periods.name: Early Global Period
periods.descriptor: Teotihuacan begins radiating influence becoming the “arcane metropole of Mesoamerica.”

periods.name: Period of Consolidation
periods.descriptor: First of the Wizarding schools are built (Uagadou & Hogwarts)

periods.name: Early Educational Period
periods.descriptor: The last of the early educational institutions is built

periods.name: Early Period of Institutionalization
periods.descriptor: Normans invade Ireland and the Founding of the Council of Warlocks

periods.name: Late Period of Institutionalization
periods.descriptor: Ghengis Khan unifies the Mongol tribes

periods.name: Mongol Period
periods.descriptor: Ghengis Khan dies

periods.name: First Epoch of Persecution
periods.descriptor: Pope authorizes the inquisition to prosecute witchcraft as a form of heresy

periods.name: Second Epoch of Persecution
periods.descriptor: Black Death Begins

periods.name: Period of Muggle Mortality
periods.descriptor: Red Turban Rebellion establishes the Ming Dynasty

periods.name: Period of the Ming and Ottomans
periods.descriptor: Wizards improve protection and alarm spells and begin to fear Muggles somewhat less

periods.name: Period of Commercialization & Sport
periods.descriptor: Ordinance of Villers-Cotterêts & Wizengamot Established

periods.name: Nominal Period
periods.descriptor: St Mungos & Gringotts founded; First Goblin Rebellion

periods.name: Period of Goblin and Muggle Upheaval
periods.descriptor: Statute of Secrecy is fully enacted

periods.name: Interregnum of Secrecy
periods.descriptor: Ministry of Magic is established to aid in the organization of secrecy efforts

periods.name: Quinquagenary of the Veil
periods.descriptor: End of the Second Goblin Rebellion

periods.name: Quadrancentennial of the Veil
periods.descriptor: Rappaport’s Law passed in the US

periods.name: Age of Estrangement
periods.descriptor: End of the Ranrok Rebellion

periods.name: Interbellum of Shadows
periods.descriptor: Start of the Global Wizarding War

periods.name: The Period of the Global Wizarding War
periods.descriptor: Grindelwald defeated by Dumbledore

periods.name: The Vicennial of Peace
periods.descriptor: Repeal of rappaport's law

periods.name: The Lustrum of Unveiling
periods.descriptor: Disappearances begin

periods.name: The Period of the First Wizarding War
periods.descriptor: Voldemort is "killed" the first time

periods.name: The Respite of the Recessional
periods.descriptor: Return of Voldemort

periods.name: The Period of the Second Wizarding War
periods.descriptor: Fall of Voldemort

periods.name: The Naïve Interlude
periods.descriptor: The Council of the Seven is formed

periods.name: The Period of the Third Wizarding War
periods.descriptor: The Third Wizarding War
